schedule: before 6am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: primevue + @primeuix/* are exact-pinned byte-identical to what @getodk/web-forms bundles (docs/product/tech-stack.md, pnpm verify:webforms); they move only when web-forms moves
Bumping the preview engine is a deliberate task (re-pin PrimeVue, re-run golden + preview e2e) — dashboard approval only, never an automatic PR
xlsx installs from the cdn.sheetjs.com tarball (the npm registry copy is stale); the npm datasource cannot track it
vue-tsc is incompatible with TypeScript 7 (docs/product/tech-stack.md pin)
devDependencies: one grouped weekly PR for patch+minor; majors stay individual
runtime dependencies: patch+minor grouped, majors individual
